title: Privileged Group Modification
description: Detects modification of privileged groups (Domain/Enterprise/Schema Admins, Administrators) via 4728/4732/4756.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS performed_by, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'EEE HH:mm') AS when_local, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4728%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4732%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4756%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Domain Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Enterprise Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Schema Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Administrators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Backup Operators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Account Operators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Server Operators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%DnsAdmins%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
